Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "FIREANT-6000-4800" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $6000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fire Ant.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $6000 to set $291 to $80 as it was after loading the original, which allows the game to start (presumably some kind of basic copy protection).
